description_long: This is a rugged, open-frame off-road vehicle with a tubular steel roll cage and exposed suspension components. The body is compact and low to the ground, with large, knobby tires designed for traction on rough terrain. The front features a minimal hood and two round headlights, while the rear exposes the engine and mechanical parts, including a visible fuel tank and exhaust system. The interior consists of two bucket seats with harnesses, and the dashboard is sparse, emphasizing utility over comfort. The vehicle's exterior is predominantly matte black with signs of dirt and wear, suggesting frequent use in challenging environments. Its design is reminiscent of a dune buggy or sand rail, optimized for agility and durability rather than cargo capacity.
description: A compact, open-frame off-road vehicle with a tubular roll cage, large knobby tires, and exposed mechanical components. Its matte black exterior and rugged build are suited for rough terrain.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tubular frame, two seats, and large off-road tires; the engine and rear suspension are visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the minimal hood, round headlights, and wide stance with exposed suspension.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the open cockpit and rear mechanical components.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the exposed engine, fuel tank, and rear suspension, with the roll cage structure prominent.
